episodes.title: Day Zero
episodes.description: The storm hits without warning. By dawn, the eastern seaboard's power grid is gone — all of it.

episodes.title: Dark Hours
episodes.description: Twenty-four hours in: hospitals run on backup, water treatment starts to fail, and the silence is wrong.

episodes.title: The Signal
episodes.description: A shortwave broadcast in the static gives coordinates — someone, somewhere, is still organized.

episodes.title: Cascade
episodes.description: Power engineers realize the grid wasn't just damaged — it was specifically targeted.

episodes.title: Safe Zones
episodes.description: Three survivors from different backgrounds converge on the same coordinates.

episodes.title: Protocol Sigma
episodes.description: A classified government continuity plan activates — but the people meant to execute it are missing.

episodes.title: The Long Dark
episodes.description: Week three. Society's surface fractures along exactly the lines everyone feared.

episodes.title: First Light
episodes.description: A partial restoration in one city reveals who really controls what comes back on — and what stays dark.

episodes.title: New Order
episodes.description: Six months after the storm, a patchwork of local grids operates under unclear authority.

episodes.title: The Reconstruction Economy
episodes.description: Control of the grid means control of everything — and the bidding is not public.

episodes.title: Resistance Infrastructure
episodes.description: An underground network of engineers is building a grid that no single entity can own.

episodes.title: The Architects of Dark
episodes.description: Evidence surfaces that the original storm was not a natural event.

episodes.title: Double Protocol
episodes.description: The government's continuity plan and the resistance plan are on a collision course.

episodes.title: Power On
episodes.description: The season finale: both plans execute simultaneously — and only one can hold.

extras.title: Grid Failure: The Reality
extras.description: Engineers and former FEMA officials discuss real grid vulnerability.

extras.title: Production Design: Building a Dark City
extras.description: How the series depicted a major city without power at scale.
